title: COPY INTO fails on perfectly clean CSV file
poc: CREATE TABLE "Batting" ("playerID" STRING, "yearID" INTEGER, stint INTEGER, "teamID" STRING, "lgID" STRING, "G" INTEGER, "AB" INTEGER, "R" INTEGER, "H" INTEGER, "X2B" INTEGER, "X3B" INTEGER, "HR" INTEGER, "RBI" INTEGER, "SB" INTEGER, "CS" INTEGER, "BB" INTEGER, "SO" INTEGER, "IBB" INTEGER, "HBP" INTEGER, "SH" INTEGER, "SF" INTEGER, "GIDP" INTEGER);
key_bug_features: COPY INTO fails on clean CSV file
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "Batting" ("playerID" STRING NOT NULL, "yearID" INTEGER CHECK ("yearID" > 1900), stint INTEGER DEFAULT 1, "teamID" STRING, "lgID" STRING, "G" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "AB" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "R" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "H" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "X2B" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "X3B" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "HR" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "RBI" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "SB" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "CS" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "BB" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "SO" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "IBB" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "HBP" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "SH" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "SF" INTEGER DEFAULT 0, "GIDP" INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Batting" WHERE "G" IS NULL OR "AB" IS NULL;
